title: Corner-Free Reservations: Packing an N x N Slot Grid
strategies: single-row baseline: reserve every free cell in the fullest time slot (always corner-free)
lexicographic greedy: scan cells in row-major order, keep each free cell that completes no conflict corner with the set so far
multi-restart randomized greedy: run the corner-avoiding greedy under many seeded scan orders and keep the largest schedule
structured algebraic construction: place cells on residues r+2c of a 3-AP-free set so no corner can form
